specific_mechanism: Scribal hand identification: each scribe produces letter-form variants; letter-form topological signature (loop count, ductus, ligature) identifies scribe
llm_application: LLM authorship via letter-form topology: each model's writing-style has topological signature (token-bigram graphs, loop counts in attention); model identification via signature.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes paleography topological-defect mapping as proposed.
